topic: I bought an old house at auction and the previous owner had nailed every window shut
title: I Bought an Old House at Auction. The Previous Owner Had Nailed Every Window Shut | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I bought the house at auction. Every window was nailed shut from the inside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an interior window frame with multiple long iron nails driven through the wooden sash into the frame, paint chipped around each nail head, dim afternoon light through the dirty glass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three bedroom Victorian on Elm Street. Sold for forty thousand below comp.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of an old three-story Victorian house with peeling paint, overgrown front yard, late afternoon light, a faded AUCTION sign still tilted in the front lawn, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Previous owner was an elderly woman. Lived there fifty years.
scenes.image_prompt: interior wide shot of an empty old-fashioned living room with floral wallpaper, sheets covering the furniture, afternoon light through dirty windows, dust visible in the air, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Eleven windows in the house. Each one nailed. Six nails per sash.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a hallway with several visible windows along one side, each window blocked by interior wooden boards or visible nails through the sash, dim natural light leaking through gaps, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand holding a claw hammer, the curved end pulling at a long nail in a window frame, dust from old paint lifting around the work, afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First night with the windows open, I heard scratching at the screen.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old window screen from inside at night, the mesh slightly bowed inward as if pressed from the outside, no figure visible beyond, dim moonlight catching the edge of the frame, vertical 9:16 framing
extreme close up of a hand turning a brass window lock latch into the closed position, the metal slightly tarnished, dim bedside lamp light, the window glass dark beyond, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next morning the screen was bowed inward six inches.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a window screen from inside, the metal mesh visibly distorted and pushed inward, the shape suggesting pressure from the outside, morning light leaking through the warped frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove to the realtor. Asked about the previous owner.
scenes.image_prompt: interior shot of a small real estate office, a desk with a computer monitor, an empty client chair, a window with closed blinds behind, fluorescent overhead light, no people visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She had not died in the house. She refused to leave for forty years.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old framed black and white photograph on a fireplace mantel showing a young woman from behind looking out a window, the photo faded with age, dust on the frame, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I nailed the windows shut again that afternoon.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a hammer driving a long iron nail into a wooden window sash, the nail head clearly visible, paint chips falling, afternoon light through the dirty glass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep with the bedroom door locked. The scratching is on the inside now.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an interior bedroom door from inside the room at night, the brass handle turned to locked position, the door slightly worn at the bottom edge, a single bedside lamp casting low light, vertical 9:16 framing
